name: test
readme:
Short:        Condition evaluation utility
Type:         util/cli
Architecture: m68k-amigaos >= 3.0
Uploader:     duncan (at) bowring (dot) us
Author:       Erik Baalbergen (ported by Duncan Bowring)
Version:      1.23

test - Condition evaluation utility

Original author: Erik Baalbergen
Ported by Duncan Bowring using amiport (AI-assisted porting toolkit).
Project: https://github.com/bdgscotland/amiport

Cross-compiled for AmigaOS 3.x (68000+).
Tested in vamos emulator and FS-UAE.

Usage:
  test [options] [arguments]

Includes full source code (original POSIX and ported Amiga versions)
porting_notes: Port from OpenBSD. Applied standard amiport transformations: exit codes mapped to AmigaOS conventions (0/10/20), __stack cookie set to 8192. Supports the full set of POSIX test operators: string tests (-z, -n, =, !=), integer comparisons (-eq, -ne, -lt, -le, -gt, -ge), file tests (-e, -f, -d, -r, -w, -x, -s, -L, etc.), and boolean operators (-a, -o, !). 97/97 FS-UAE tests pass.
